title: Taking on Neo-Nazis, One Trademark at a Time
summary_full: In Germany, a campaign called Rights Against the Right is securing trademarks for right-wing symbols and phrases, aiming to cut into a revenue stream that sustains hate groups.
summary_public: In Germany, a campaign called Rights Against the Right is securing trademarks for right-wing symbols and phrases, aiming to cut into a revenue stream that sustains hate groups.

DE.label: positive
DE.evidence: campaign called Rights Against the Right is securing trademarks
